apps.name: Mirage
apps.description: Stream a Mac window, full desktop or secondary display to another Apple device.
apps.bestFor: Power users who want flexible second-screen and remote-display workflows.

apps.name: DockFreeze
apps.description: Lock the macOS Dock to one display so it stops jumping around multi-monitor setups.
apps.bestFor: Anyone running multiple displays who wants one tiny fix for Dock behavior.

apps.name: Docomments
apps.description: Attach Markdown notes to files and folders using Finder metadata that remains Spotlight-searchable.
apps.bestFor: People who need lightweight context notes without maintaining a separate file database.

apps.name: SonicFlow
apps.description: A free open-source per-app volume mixer for macOS with separate sliders for active audio sources.
apps.bestFor: Users who miss Windows-style app audio controls on the Mac.

apps.name: Dockspace
apps.description: Add previews, widgets and controls directly to the Dock.
apps.bestFor: Large-display users who want the Dock to become active workspace instead of a static launcher.

apps.name: Mailway
apps.description: Route mailto links to the right native app or webmail account using recipient and domain rules.
apps.bestFor: People splitting work and personal email across multiple clients.

apps.name: Auto Ducking
apps.description: Automatically lowers background audio whenever your microphone becomes active.
apps.bestFor: Calls, dictation, recording and voice-first AI workflows.

apps.name: Gemini Spark for Mac
apps.description: Google's Mac assistant is beginning to act on shared local files and connected apps.
apps.bestFor: Users tracking the move from chatbot shortcuts toward desktop agents.

apps.name: Mobile Builds
apps.description: Track Xcode Cloud build status, history and failures from a focused Mac and iOS app.
apps.bestFor: Apple developers who want build awareness outside the browser.

apps.name: macOS 27 beta 3
apps.description: Platform update checkpoint for developers testing compatibility.
